evidence_summary: Vendor trust center indicates current SOC 2 Type II coverage for core platform controls.
Public AI policy page describes model oversight human review and monitoring principles.
Public status page shows service uptime and incident reporting approach.
Public resilience page references continuity planning and disaster recovery capabilities.
Public profile provides limited financial and ownership information but does not replace audited financial statements.
